productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Solid Maroon Shirt
description: Composition Maroon shirt made of 100% cotton, has a buttoned mandarin collar with a front buttoned concealed placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash and dry inside out Machine wash cold in gentle cycle using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry in shade Mild iron Dressing the elite for years, Reid and Taylor has crafted some classy casual wear that cannot but make you look regal. Crafted from pure cotton fabric in fashionable cuts, this casual shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team it with chinos. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
